problem.title: FAST-LIO2 on KITTI Raw drive 0061 (200 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does FAST-LIO2 perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 (200 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Default (no IMU)
variants.intent: LiDAR-only mode; no IMU data available in KITTI Raw fixtures.
variants.note: LiDAR-inertial odometry with iterated Kalman filter and voxel map (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce keypoint density and map window for faster LiDAR-inertial updates.
variants.note: LiDAR-inertial odometry with iterated Kalman filter and voxel map (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase keypoint density and map window for a more exhaustive LiDAR-inertial solve.
variants.note: LiDAR-inertial odometry with iterated Kalman filter and voxel map (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
